summary: Completed testing of Iteration 16 - Blog/News Section. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. The blog feature is fully functional with public and authenticated endpoints, post CRUD (faculty+ only), comments (any auth user), category filtering, and proper visibility controls.
critical_code_review_comments: blog.py: Well-structured 253-line router with proper role-based access control
FACULTY_ROLES = {'faculty', 'elder', 'admin'} - Note: 'teacher' role is NOT included, may need to add if teachers should publish
Slug auto-generation with deduplication works correctly
Comments cascade delete when post is deleted
PublicBlogPage.jsx uses direct fetch() instead of apiGet since no auth needed - correct approach
LandingPage.jsx fetches latest 3 public posts and displays in 'Stories & Insights' section
seed_data_creation: Created 1 sample blog post 'Welcome to The Ile Ubuntu Blog' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 added a full blog/news section. Key endpoints: GET /api/blog/categories (7 categories), GET /api/blog/posts/public (no auth), GET /api/blog/posts (auth), POST /api/blog/posts (faculty+ only), PUT/DELETE /api/blog/posts/{id}, POST /api/blog/posts/{id}/comments (any auth), DELETE /api/blog/comments/{id}. Frontend pages: /blog (public for unauth, auth for logged in), /blog/new (editor), /blog/:slug (post view). Sidebar has Blog nav item. Landing page has 'Latest from the Commons' section showing up to 3 public posts.

backend: TestPublicBlogPosts - 3 tests PASSED (public endpoint, category filter, pagination)
TestBlogPostCRUD - 3 tests PASSED (401 without auth for create/update/delete)
TestAuthenticatedBlogCRUD - 10 tests PASSED (full CRUD flow with auth)
TestStudentCannotCreatePost - 1 test PASSED (403 for student role)
frontend: Public blog page renders at /blog with data-testid='public-blog-page' - PASSED
All 7 category filter buttons present - PASSED
Join The Ile Ubuntu CTA button present - PASSED
Blog post card displays correctly with cover image - PASSED
Landing page Blog link in navbar - PASSED
Landing page 'Latest from the Commons' section - PASSED
Landing page shows blog post cards - PASSED
View All button navigates to /blog - PASSED

backend_endpoints.GET /api/blog/posts/public: WORKING - Returns public posts without auth
backend_endpoints.GET /api/blog/posts: WORKING - Returns all published posts (auth required)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/blog/posts/by-slug/{slug}: WORKING - Returns full post with content
backend_endpoints.GET /api/blog/posts/public/by-slug/{slug: WORKING - Returns public post without auth
backend_endpoints.POST /api/blog/posts: WORKING - Creates post (faculty+ only, 403 for students)

frontend_pages.PublicBlogPage (/blog unauthenticated): WORKING - Shows public posts, category filters, sign in CTA
frontend_pages.BlogPage (/blog authenticated): WORKING - Shows all posts, Write Post button for faculty+
frontend_pages.BlogEditorPage (/blog/new): WORKING - Create/edit post form with markdown support
frontend_pages.BlogPostPage (/blog/:slug): WORKING - Full post view with comments section
frontend_pages.LandingPage (/): WORKING - Shows Blog link in navbar, latest posts section

design_review.images: Cover images load correctly from Unsplash
design_review.responsive: Good - Grid layout adapts to screen size
